arguments.content:
# Work Plan: April 13–17, 2026

**Sprint:** Sprint 9 (Week 2)  
**Team Lead:** Alex Zhang  
**Week Focus:** Documentation, planning, and feature implementation kickoff

---

## Monday, April 13

| Time | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|------|-------|-------------|
| 09:00–10:30 | Sprint 9 kickoff meeting | Alex | Meeting notes, finalized scope |
| 10:30–12:00 | Technical specification drafting | Alex | Sprint 9 tech spec document |
| 13:30–15:00 | Roadmap Q2 feature planning | Alex | Updated roadmap with 3 new features |
| 15:00–17:00 | Tech debt assessment | Alex/Bai | Tech debt list in JSON format |
| 17:00–18:00 | Daily standup & week planning | Team | This work plan document |

**Expected Deliverables:**
- Sprint 9 technical specification
- Updated Q2 roadmap
- Sprint 9 tech debt list
- Week work plan

---

## Tuesday, April 14

| Time | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|------|-------|-------------|
| 09:00–10:00 | Daily standup | Team | Blockers identified |
| 10:00–12:30 | Notification system: API design & schema | Bai | API spec, DB migration scripts |
| 13:30–16:00 | Notification system: WebSocket implementation | Bai | Core WebSocket handler |
| 16:00–18:00 | Redis Pub/Sub setup & testing | Bai | Redis config, integration tests |

**Expected Deliverables:**
- Notification API specification
- Database migration for notifications table
- WebSocket connection handler
- Redis Pub/Sub integration

---

## Wednesday, April 15

| Time | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|------|-------|-------------|
| 09:00–09:30 | Daily standup | Team | Progress review |
| 09:30–12:30 | Search system: Elasticsearch mapping design | Alex | Index mappings, sync strategy |
| 13:30–15:30 | Search system: Query API implementation | Alex | Search endpoints, query DSL |
| 15:30–17:00 | Search system: Frontend integration prep | Chen | API contract, mock data |
| 17:00–18:00 | Code review: Notification system PR | Team | Reviewed & approved PR |

**Expected Deliverables:**
- Elasticsearch index mappings
- Search API endpoints
- Frontend API integration plan
- Reviewed notification system code

---

## Thursday, April 16

| Time | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|------|-------|-------------|
| 09:00–09:30 | Daily standup | Team | Blockers resolution |
| 09:30–12:30 | RBAC system: Permission model design | Alex | Casbin model, policy structure |
| 13:30–16:00 | RBAC system: Core middleware implementation | Bai | Auth middleware, permission checks |
| 16:00–17:30 | RBAC system: Role management API | Bai | CRUD endpoints for roles |
| 17:30–18:00 | Search system: Integration testing | Dana | Test results, bug reports |

**Expected Deliverables:**
- Casbin configuration & policy model
- RBAC middleware for API protection
- Role management API
- Search system test report

---

## Friday, April 17

| Time | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|------|-------|-------------|
| 09:00–09:30 | Daily standup | Team | Week summary |
| 09:30–11:00 | End-to-end testing: Notifications | Dana | E2E test results |
| 11:00–12:30 | Performance testing: Search APIs | Alex/Bai | Load test report |
| 13:30–15:00 | Documentation update: API docs | Chen | Updated OpenAPI specs |
| 15:00–16:30 | Week 2 retrospective prep | Alex | Retrospective agenda |
| 16:30–17:30 | Sprint progress review with PM | Alex | Progress report |
| 17:30–18:00 | Week wrap-up & next week planning | Team | Priorities for Week 3 |

**Expected Deliverables:**
- E2E test results for notifications
- Performance benchmark report
- Updated API documentation
- Sprint progress report to PM
- Week 3 priorities list

---

## Weekly Milestones

| Milestone | Target Date | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| Tech spec & planning docs complete | April 13 | In Progress |
| Notification system core implemented | April 14 | Pending |
| Search system API ready | April 15 | Pending |
| RBAC foundation implemented | April 16 | Pending |
| Week 2 deliverables accepted | April 17 | Pending |

---

## Key Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
| WebSocket scaling issues | High | Early load testing on Thursday |
| ES mapping conflicts | Medium | Schema review with team Wednesday |
| RBAC complexity delays | Medium | Simplified MVP approach if needed |

---

## Notes

- All times are in CST (UTC+8)
- Daily standups are 30 minutes max
- Code reviews required for all backend PRs
- Documentation updates should follow existing templates
